title: Benjamin Garcia

{{short description|France international rugby league footballer}} {{for multi|the chemist|Benjamin A. Garcia|the American track and field athlete|Benjamin Garcia (athlete)}} {{Use dmy dates|date=July 2016}} {{Infobox rugby league biography |name = Ben Garcia |fullname = Benjamin Garcia |image = Benjamin Garcia.JPG |imagesize = 290 |birth_date = {{birth date and age|df=yes|1993|4|5}} |birth_place = [[Apt, Vaucluse|Apt]], [[Vaucluse]],
[[Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur]], France{{cite web|date=11 June 2015|title=Penrith Panthers sign Frenchman Ben Garcia from Catalans Dragons|url=http://www.dailytelegraph.com.au/sport/nrl/teams/panthers/nrl-2015-penrith-panthers-sign-frenchman-ben-garcia-from-catalans-dragons/news-story/8e1dedf5927b645149e36ee572efda06|publisher=Daily Telegraph|accessdate=1 November 2016}} |height = {{convert|1.80|m|ftin|abbr=on|order=flip}} |weight = {{convert|98|kg|stlb|abbr=on|order=flip}}{{cite web|title=Catalans Dragons Equipe Saison 2015|url=http://www.catalansdragons.com/equipe/|publisher=catalansdragons.com|accessdate=30 June 2015|language=French}} |position = {{rlp|LF|HK|SR}} |club1 = [[Catalans Dragons]] |year1start = 2013 |year1end = 15 |appearances1 = 49 |tries1 = 10 |goals1 = 0 |fieldgoals1 = 0 |points1 = 40 |club2 = [[Penrith Panthers]] |year2start = 2016 |year2end = |appearances2 = 0 |tries2 = 0 |goals2 = 0 |fieldgoals2 = 0 |points2 = 0 |club3 = [[Catalans Dragons]] |year3start = 2016 |year3end = present |appearances3 = 219 |tries3 = 35 |goals3 = 0 |fieldgoals3 = 0 |points3 = 116 |teamA = [[France national rugby league team|France]] |yearAstart = 2013 |yearAend = present |appearancesA = 17 |triesA = 3 |goalsA = 0 |fieldgoalsA = 0 |pointsA = 12 |retired = |source = [http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/players/benjamin-garcia/summary.html Rugby League Project][http://www.loverugbyleague.com/stats/players/Benjamin-Garcia/ Love Rugby League] |updated = 27 October 2025 }} '''Benjamin Garcia''' (born 5 April 1993) is a French professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|lf}}, {{rlp|hk}} or {{rlp|sr}} for the [[Catalans Dragons]] in the [[Super League]] and [[France national rugby league team|France]] at international level. He spent time with the [[Penrith Panthers]] as part of their squad during the [[2016 NRL season]]. ==Background== He was born in [[Apt, Vaucluse]], [[France]]. He is of [[Spaniards|Spanish]] and [[Algerian people|Algerian]] descent. ==Playing career== A [[SO Avignon]] junior and French junior international representative, Garcia moved to Australia to play for the [[Wynnum Manly Seagulls]] in the [[FOGS Colts Challenge]] in 2012.{{cite web|last=Ricketts|first=Steve|date=9 March 2012|title=Wynnum-Manly Seagulls have added a French connection to their books for the 2012 Intrust Super Cup|url=http://www.couriermail.com.au/sport/wynnum-manly-seagulls-have-added-a-french-connection-to-their-books-for-the-2012-intrust-super-cup/story-e6frep5o-1226293918719|publisher=Courier-Mail|accessdate=1 November 2016}} After winning the Seagulls' FOGS Colts player of the year award,{{cite web|title=Presentation Night 2012| date=11 June 2016 |url=http://www.wynnumseagulls.com.au/index.php?option=com_content&view=article&id=1430|publisher=WynnumSeagulls.com.au|accessdate=1 November 2016}} Garcia moved into the [[Brisbane Broncos]]' [[National Youth Competition (rugby league)|National Youth Competition]] squad in 2013. In June 2013, he moved to the [[Catalans Dragons]] mid-season on a two-year contract,{{cite web|date=21 June 2013|title=Benjamin Garcia: Brisbane Broncos forward joins Catalans|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/23002926|publisher=BBC|access-date=12 June 2015}} making his [[Super League]] debut against the [[Leeds Rhinos]] on 31 August 2013. On 10 June 2015, Garcia signed a two-year contract with [[Penrith Panthers|Penrith]] of the [[National Rugby League]], starting in 2016.{{cite web|date=10 June 2015|title=Panthers sign Quartet of Young Guns – Panthers|url=http://www.penrithpanthers.com.au/news/2015/06/10/panthers_sign_quarte.html|publisher=penrithpanthers.com.au|accessdate=12 June 2015}}{{cite web|date=10 June 2015|title=Catalan (sic) Dragons forward Benjamin Garcia to join Penrith Panthers in NRL|url=http://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12216/9880272/catalan-dragons-forward-benjamin-garcia-to-join-penrith-panthers-in-nrl|publisher=Sky Sports|accessdate=1 November 2016}} Garcia was named in Penrith's squad for the [[2016 NRL Auckland Nines|2016 Auckland Nines]], scoring a try in their match against the [[North Queensland Cowboys]].{{cite web|last=Kennedy|first=Chris|date=7 February 2016|title=Cowboys muscle up to deny Panthers|url=http://www.nrl.com/cowboys-muscle-up-to-deny-panthers/tabid/10874/newsid/92690/default.aspx|publisher=NRL.com|accessdate=1 November 2016}} He rejoined the Dragons in June 2016.{{cite web|last=Reynolds|first=Ben|date=23 June 2016|title=Catalans Dragons re-sign Ben Garcia from Penrith Panthers|url=http://www.skysports.com/rugby-league/news/12216/10322566/catalans-dragons-re-sign-ben-garcia-from-penrith-panthers|publisher=Sky Sports|accessdate=17 July 2016}} He played in the [[2018 Challenge Cup Final]] victory over the [[Warrington Wolves]] at [[Wembley Stadium]].{{cite web|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2018/aug/25/catalans-dragons-warrington-wolves-challenge-cup-final-match-report|title=Catalans Dragons beat Warrington in Challenge Cup final to make history|publisher=Guardian|date=25 August 2018|accessdate=5 November 2019}} On 9 October 2021, Garcia played for Catalans in their [[2021 Super League Grand Final]] defeat against St. Helens.{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/58858850|title=Super League Grand Final: Catalans Dragons 10-12 St Helens: Saints win three in a row|work=BBC Sport }} On 14 October, Garcia played in Catalans [[2023 Super League Grand Final]] loss against [[Wigan Warriors|Wigan]].{{cite news|url=https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2023/oct/14/catalans-dragons-wigan-super-league-grand-final-rugby-league-match-report/|title=Wigan Warriors crowned Super League champions after downing Dragons|newspaper=The Observer|date=14 October 2023 |last1=Bower |first1=Aaron }} ===International career=== On 24 October 2012, Garcia was called into [[France national rugby league team|France]]'s train-on squad for the [[2012 Autumn International Series]].{{cite web|date=24 October 2012|title=Teenager Garcia called into French train-on squad|url=https://www.nrl.com/teenager-garcia-called-into-french-train-on-squad/tabid/11525/newsid/70288/default.aspx|publisher=NRL.com|accessdate=1 November 2016}} Following injuries to [[Clément Soubeyras]] and [[Mathias Pala]], Garcia was called into France's squad for the [[2013 Rugby League World Cup]].{{cite web|date=8 October 2013|title=Catalans dominate France World Cup squad|url=http://www.smh.com.au/rugby-league/league-news/catalans-dominate-france-world-cup-squad-20131007-2v4uu.html|publisher=Sydney Morning Herald|accessdate=1 November 2016}}{{cite web|title=Benjamin Garcia named in France squad|url=http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/articles-9/58-2562-benjamin-garcia-named-in-france-squad/|publisher=catalansdragons.com|accessdate=1 November 2016}} He made his international debut on 27 October 2013 and played in three of France's [[2013 Rugby League World Cup Group B|Group B matches]]. Garcia played for France in all three of their matches at the [[2014 European Cup]]. He was unavailable for selection for the [[2015 European Cup]].{{cite web|date=1 October 2015|title=Agar names France's 23-man squad|url=http://www.rlef.eu.com/france/news/article/1144/agar-names-france%E2%80%99s-23-man-squad|publisher=Rugby League European Federation|accessdate=1 November 2016|quote=Ben Garcia is unavailable as he heads to Australia to start his new career.|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20161101164531/http://www.rlef.eu.com/france/news/article/1144/agar-names-france%E2%80%99s-23-man-squad|archive-date=1 November 2016|url-status=dead}} Garcia played in France's lone international fixture of 2016, an [[2016 Rugby League Four Nations#France vs England|end of year test match]] against England. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== {{Commons category|Benjamin Garcia}} *[http://www.catalansdragons.com/en/fiche-124-garcia-benjamin/ Catalans Dragons profile] *[http://www.ffr13.fr/wp-content/uploads/2015/08/benjamin_garcia-791x1024.jpg France profile] *[https://www.superleague.co.uk/player/282/ben%3Cbr-%3Egarcia SL profile] *[http://www.rlwc2017.com/players?team=380#Benjamin-Garcia 2017 RLWC profile] *[https://www.ffr13.fr/joueur/benjamin-garcia/ French profile] *[https://www.nrl.com/players/rugby-league-world-cup/france/benjamin-garcia/ France RL profile] {{Catalans Dragons squad}} {{Catalans Dragons - 2018 Challenge Cup Final winners}} {{France 2013 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{France 2017 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{France 2021 Rugby League World Cup squad}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Garcia, Benjamin}} [[Category:1993 births]] [[Category:Living people]] [[Category:21st-century French sportsmen]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons captains]] [[Category:Catalans Dragons players]] [[Category:France national rugby league team captains]] [[Category:France national rugby league team players]] [[Category:French rugby league players]] [[Category:Rugby league centres]] [[Category:Rugby league props]] [[Category:Rugby league players from Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur]] [[Category:Rugby league second-rows]] [[Category:Wynnum Manly Seagulls players]]
